probe_stdout: CONFIRMED — two distinct VersionPolicy values produce byte-equal canonical payloads (34 bytes). A.min_required="1.0.0\0relaxed" A.recommended="9.9.9" B.min_required="1.0.0" B.recommended="relaxed\09.9.9"
trigger_summary: Two VersionPolicy values that differ only by where a NUL byte sits within their string fields produce identical canonical signing payloads, so one Ed25519 signature can authenticate either policy.
